sentences.english: I should have come earlier.
sentences.hindi: मुझे पहले आना चाहिए था।

sentences.english: You should have apologized to him.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें उससे माफी मांगनी चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: you should have apologized to him

sentences.english: He should have worked harder.
sentences.hindi: उसे ज्यादा मेहनत करनी चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: he should have worked harder

sentences.english: I should have told this earlier.
sentences.hindi: मुझे यह पहले बताना चाहिए था।
sentences.pronunciation: i should have told this earlier

sentences.english: We should have been more careful.
sentences.hindi: हमें ज्यादा सावधान रहना चाहिए था।
sentences.pronunciation: we should have been more careful

sentences.english: You should have listened to him.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें उसकी बात सुननी चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: you should have listened to him

sentences.english: She should have told the truth.
sentences.hindi: उसे सच बोलना चाहिए था।
sentences.pronunciation: she should have told the truth

sentences.english: I should have read this book.
sentences.hindi: मुझे यह किताब पढ़नी चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: i should have read this book

sentences.english: We should have arrived on time.
sentences.hindi: हमें समय पर पहुँचना चाहिए था।
sentences.pronunciation: we should have arrived on time

sentences.english: You should not have made this mistake.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें यह गलती नहीं करनी चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: you should not have made this mistake

sentences.hindi: उसे मुझे बताना चाहिए था।
sentences.pronunciation: he should have told me

sentences.english: I should have saved more money.
sentences.hindi: मुझे ज्यादा पैसे बचाने चाहिए थे।
sentences.pronunciation: i should have saved more money

sentences.english: We should have thought earlier.
sentences.hindi: हमें पहले सोचना चाहिए था।
sentences.pronunciation: we should have thought earlier

sentences.english: You should have stopped him.

sentences.pronunciation: you should have stopped him

sentences.english: She should not have left this job.
sentences.hindi: उसे यह जॉब नहीं छोड़नी चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she should not have left this job

sentences.hindi: मुझे ज्यादा practice करनी चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: i should have practiced more

sentences.english: We should have helped him.
sentences.hindi: हमें उसकी मदद करनी चाहिए थी।

sentences.pronunciation: you should have expressed your point correctly

sentences.hindi: उसे अपनी गलती स्वीकार करनी चाहिए थी।

sentences.english: I should have driven more carefully.
